_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: Following cre-recombinase adrenovirus infection, ERK1/2 phosphorylation status was increased...Lovastatin treatment (20 µM for 12 hours) consistently decreased ERK1/2 activation...
details: Successfully detected increased ERK1/2 phosphorylation in Nf1-/- osteoblasts and reduction following lovastatin treatment
